g.text: Library Artifacts Personas Watchlists Schedules Workflows MCP ACP Skills Settings
Import a new media file for processing
Open Home for Dashboard, notifications, status, and next actions.
Open Console for Live agent conversations, approvals, tools, RAG, and runs.
Open Library for Workspaces, source material, imports, notes, media, conversations, Study, flashcards, quizzes, and Search/RAG.
Open Artifacts for Generated outputs, bundles, reports, datasets, and Chatbooks.
Setup required: Choose model before sending.
